apps.name: Locating SPP
apps.localizedDescription: This is the first Locating app release, this is a app for finding Vore pathners in a map using the location.

permissions.usageDescription: Needed to keep the app updated.

news.title: Welcome!
news.caption: Locating's first release!, this is the fort release pf the Locating Vore app, it includes a profile creator, a map viewer to discover other profiles, global posts (still in beta), opening social media links from profile and more content, plesee enjoy this first version I made woth love to all the preds, preys and switches.
